creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks Antoine, I will soon check into those new failures.
I have followed Gerarld's suggestion and applied those two patches: indeed, issues are coming from lang/gcc13 only.

Hopefully, we will be able to close this PR within this quarter... I think I will fix most of the new failures with USE_GCC=12, so that the GCC_DEFAULT update does not wait any more: it has already taken a lot of time.
